{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Dyrakks
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Dyrakks]] are herbivores.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
